message:
test(cli): add contract tests for ft tx plan/show/run JSON envelopes

Cover the tx subcommand surface with integration tests: plan, show
with --include-contract, run with --fail-step (success and error),
and robot-mode wrappers. Validates JSON structure, exit codes,
error_code fields, and corrective hints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
